Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class WaveXmdDimension

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.WaveXmdDimension
public class WaveXmdDimension extends Object

Java class for WaveXmdDimension complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WaveXmdDimension">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="conditionalFormatting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdFormattingProperty" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customActions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdDimensionCustomAction" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customActionsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultAction" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="field" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fullyQualifiedName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="imageTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isDerived" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isMultiValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkTemplate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkTemplateEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkTooltip" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="members" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdDimensionMember" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="origin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordDisplayFields" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdRecordDisplayLookup" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordIdField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordOrganizationIdField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="salesforceActions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WaveXmdDimensionSalesforceAction" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="salesforceActionsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showDetailsDefaultFieldIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showInExplorer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortIndex" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getConditionalFormatting

      public List<WaveXmdFormattingProperty> getConditionalFormatting()
      Gets the value of the conditionalFormatting property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conditionalFormatting property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConditionalFormatting().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WaveXmdFormattingProperty

      Returns:
      The value of the conditionalFormatting property.

    • getCustomActions

      public List<WaveXmdDimensionCustomAction> getCustomActions()
      Gets the value of the customActions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the customActions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCustomActions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WaveXmdDimensionCustomAction

      Returns:
      The value of the customActions property.

    • getMembers

      public List<WaveXmdDimensionMember> getMembers()
      Gets the value of the members property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the members property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getMembers().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WaveXmdDimensionMember

      Returns:
      The value of the members property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the recordDisplayFields property.
